name: Alex Chen
bio:
Candidate: Alex Chen
Education: B.S. Computer Science + Mathematics, State University, May 2025. GPA 3.8/4.0. Dean's List.
Selected Courses: Algorithms, Operating Systems, Machine Learning, Distributed Systems.

Research:
- AI Lab @ State University (Jan 2024 – May 2025): Researched transformer-based code generation; presented at NeurIPS student workshop.

Work Experience:
- Software Engineering Intern @ Acme Corp (May–Aug 2024): Built internal tooling dashboard reducing deploy times by 40% (React, Node.js, PostgreSQL).
- Teaching Assistant @ State University (Jan–May 2025): Graded data structures coursework, held office hours for 150+ students.

Key Projects:
- ShopTrack: Full-stack e-commerce analytics platform. Real-time inventory alerts, REST API, React dashboard. (Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis).
- DocBot: RAG-based document Q&A chatbot. Hybrid search with cross-encoder reranking. (LangChain, OpenAI API, Pinecone, FastAPI).

Tech Stack: Python, TypeScript, React, Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, GCP, Docker, LangChain.

Portfolio: alexchen.dev
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/alexchen
